title: FOOGO Green 500pcs Wooden Coffee Stirrers, Extra Long 19cm / 7.5", FSC® Certified, Cocktail Stirrers, Wooden Sticks for Craft, for Cold and Hot Drinks, Eco-Friendly, Compostable and Sturdy
features: PREMIUM QUALITY and STURDY – Made from high quality birchwood, our coffee stirrers are sturdy and work well with hot and cold drink.

ECO-FRIENDLY and SUSTAINABLE – The wooden coffee stirrers are made from birchwood which is a fast growing tree. With our earth conscious ZERO PLASTIC packaging, this is as eco-friendly and sustainable as it can get.
SMOOTH polished surface that does not leave splinters or pieces of wood in the drink
BIODEGRADABLE and home COMPOSTABLE – when used, can go straight into compost bin or food waste bin. The stirrers can be easily and safely disposed into fire pits during camping trips and barbecues.
description: Our Wooden Coffee Stirrers are the perfect addition to any coffee lover's collection. Made from high-quality birch wood, these stirrers are a sustainable alternative to plastic coffee stirrers that harm the environment. Each stirrer is 7.5 inches long and has a smooth surface, ensuring they won't splinter or break while stirring your coffee. These stirrers are great for both hot and cold drinks, making them a versatile tool in any kitchen or coffee shop. They are perfect for stirring your morning coffee, mixing in sugar or cream, and even for stirring cocktails. The wood material doesn't affect the taste of your drink, so you can enjoy the true flavor of your coffee or beverage without any interference. Our Wooden Coffee Stirrers are eco-friendly and biodegradable, making them the perfect choice for those who want to reduce their carbon footprint. They are also a great option for businesses that want to offer sustainable and environmentally friendly options to their customers. Our Wooden Coffee Stirrers come in packs of 1000, 2000, 3000, 5000 & 10,000 making them a great value for coffee shops, restaurants, or for home use. They come in a handy cardboard box, making them easy to transport and store. Whether you're a coffee enthusiast, a business owner, or just looking for a sustainable option, our Wooden Coffee Stirrers are the perfect choice for your stirring needs.
